text.p: 1 the alied forces were by the people of fulanis from the north down to the western the flee they flee down to okpobo there they were confronted by the people of owu, this alied forces were made up of men from owu, Ijebu ode and .
they believe the people of owu in their citys gate for that seven years.
when the men of owu took some properties from the Ile-Ife including the wife of okunade an artist who was blessed by the godds.

the scene is opened with lamentation of the quen Afin queen of erelu lamented over the of the city of her position as a queen of the land the of her life by the soldiers called forces her daughter wase raped and shared among
3a the people of Brehama beleives that jesus could give children.
they also believes children from tano are to be treated with care.
(5) the old man symbolizes jesus chirt to his belong tolerance poor and he was destined to suffer to make rich , he also has a hole to his palm that was as a result of a fishhook.
Riana was in her room praising serguius
